title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Cancel
scenario: Verify login/logout flow in App Settings: user can log in, see account details, then cancel logout and remain logged in.
steps: Start the app as a quest and tap the App Settings (hamburger) icon.
Tap Log in, then Continue, and log in with credentials.
expected: Step 3: "Your account" text is visible with Name and Email fields populated. Step 4: Login dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options. Step 5: Dialog disappears and user remains logged in.
